metadata.description: Skills for AI coding agents — review, research, UI/UX audit, MCP & framework builders, browser/device automation, config files, publish. Install the whole pack, a themed bundle, a single skill, or just the researcher agents.

plugins.name: yk-everything
plugins.description: The whole pack — all 46 skills plus the internet-researcher agents. Heaviest context cost; prefer a themed bundle or single skill.

plugins.name: yk-researchers
plugins.description: Internet-researcher subagents only (no skills) — api-docs, debug-stuck, tech-choice, shipping-pattern, quick, generic. Fan them out for source-backed answers.

plugins.name: yk-review
plugins.description: Review & completion — code review, review-feedback triage, done-claim audits, runtime debugging.

plugins.name: yk-frontend
plugins.description: Frontend rebuild & audit — pixel-faithful URL→Next.js, UI/UX/Laws-of-UX audits.

plugins.name: yk-mcp
plugins.description: MCP & agent interfaces — build (SDK v1/v2, mcp-use), clean architecture, convert v1→v2, test, and agent-readiness audits for MCP servers and CLIs.

plugins.name: yk-build
plugins.description: App & framework builders — Chrome MV3, Cloudflare Email Service, Effect-TS v3, Kernel SDK, LangChain.js, LicenseSeat (macOS/Swift), Raycast, Sentry (macOS/Swift), TinaCMS+Next.js.

plugins.name: yk-research
plugins.description: Research & discovery — single-question and wave-based corpus research, GitHub repo scouting, bulk Codex search. Bundles the internet-researcher subagents.

plugins.name: yk-automation
plugins.description: Live automation — agent-browser CLI, Android device control, Tailscale Funnel public tunnels.

plugins.name: yk-config
plugins.description: Instruction & config files — AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/REVIEW.md hierarchies, drift audits, scenario Makefiles.

plugins.name: yk-ops
plugins.description: Ops & release — Railway, Coolify Cloud compose deploys, repo cleanup, npm publishing.

plugins.name: yk-skills
plugins.description: Skill authoring — research-driven skill creation and derailment stress-testing of existing SKILL.md files.

plugins.name: yk-delivery
plugins.description: Aligned delivery — scored multi-round question alignment, a filename-state spec corpus, and waved parallel subagent orchestration for a large or ambiguous initiative.

plugins.name: audit-agentic-cli
plugins.description: Use if auditing or designing a CLI for agent/LLM use — JSON output, exit codes, non-interactive.

plugins.name: audit-agentic-mcp
plugins.description: Use if auditing or designing an MCP server for agent-readiness — framework, security, context.

plugins.name: audit-completion
plugins.description: Use if verifying claimed-done work or auditing session/plan/branch completion with evidence.

plugins.name: audit-skill-by-derailment
plugins.description: Use if hardening a SKILL.md by running a fresh subagent on a real task and fixing where it snags.

plugins.name: audit-ui-and-save-files
plugins.description: Use if auditing a running web app UI across pages/viewports, saving per-bug findings to a tree.

plugins.name: audit-ux-and-save-files
plugins.description: Use if auditing a running app's usability via persona journeys, saving per-issue findings to a tree.

plugins.name: audit-ux-laws
plugins.description: Use if building or auditing UI against the 30 Laws of UX (Fitts, Hick, Gestalt, cognitive load).

plugins.name: build-chrome-extension
plugins.description: Use if building or debugging a Chrome MV3 extension — manifest v3, service_worker, content_scripts.

plugins.name: build-clean-mcp-architecture
plugins.description: Use if structuring or auditing TypeScript mcp-use/server code for Clean Architecture boundaries.

plugins.name: build-cloudflare-email-sending
plugins.description: Use if sending email via Cloudflare Email Service, replacing Resend/SES/Postmark or send_email.

plugins.name: build-effect-ts-v3
plugins.description: Use if building TypeScript with Effect-TS v3 — Effect.gen, Layer, Schema, typed errors, Stream.

plugins.name: build-kernel-ts-sdk
plugins.description: Use if building browser-automation apps on the Kernel TS SDK (@onkernel/sdk) — browsers, pools.

plugins.name: build-langchain-ts-app
plugins.description: Use if building TypeScript apps with langchain/@langchain — agents, RAG, structured output.

plugins.name: build-licenseseat-swift
plugins.description: Use if integrating the LicenseSeat Swift SDK into a macOS/Swift app — activation, validation, seats.

plugins.name: build-mcp-server-sdk-v1
plugins.description: Use if building a TypeScript MCP server on @modelcontextprotocol/sdk v1.x — single-package, Zod.

plugins.name: build-mcp-server-sdk-v2
plugins.description: Use if building MCP servers on @modelcontextprotocol/server v2 alpha — split packages, registerTool.

plugins.name: build-mcp-use-agent
plugins.description: Use if building TypeScript mcp-use MCPAgent code where an LLM orchestrates MCP tools (run/stream).

plugins.name: build-mcp-use-client
plugins.description: Use if writing TypeScript mcp-use MCP client code — MCPClient, MCPSession, useMcp, mcp-use/react.

plugins.name: build-mcp-use-server
plugins.description: Use if building TypeScript MCP servers with mcp-use/server — server.tool, ctx.auth, transports.

plugins.name: build-raycast-script-command
plugins.description: Use if authoring or fixing a Raycast Script Command (@raycast.* metadata header) — fields, modes.

plugins.name: build-sentry-macos-swift
plugins.description: Use if adding or auditing Sentry crash reporting in a macOS/Swift app — dSYM, breadcrumbs, tracing.

plugins.name: build-skill
plugins.description: Use if creating, redesigning, or merging a Claude skill, with research before writing SKILL.md.

plugins.name: build-tinacms-nextjs
plugins.description: Use if building a TinaCMS + Next.js App Router site — tina/config.ts, MDX content, useTina editing.

plugins.name: convert-mcp-sdk-v1-to-v2
plugins.description: Use if porting an MCP TypeScript server from @modelcontextprotocol/sdk v1.x to the v2 SDK.

plugins.name: convert-url-to-nextjs
plugins.description: Use if rebuilding a live URL or .html snapshot as a pixel-faithful AS-IS Next.js project.

plugins.name: debug-runtime
plugins.description: Use if chasing a reproducible runtime bug or repeated failed fixes with a 4-phase root-cause pass.

plugins.name: deploy-coolify-cloud
plugins.description: Use if deploying/updating a docker-compose service on Coolify Cloud via its API — domains, env.

plugins.name: init-agent-config
plugins.description: Use if creating, auditing, or migrating CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/REVIEW.md instruction files.

plugins.name: init-jean-json
plugins.description: Use if onboarding a repo to Jean — jean.json and .worktreeinclude setup, run, teardown, ports.

plugins.name: init-makefiles
plugins.description: Use if scaffolding Makefile targets for dev, tunnels, deploys, R2, Supabase, Railway, Vercel.

plugins.name: mobilerun-control
plugins.description: Use if controlling or testing a connected Android phone via the mobilerun CLI — tap, type, swipe.

plugins.name: publish-npm-package
plugins.description: Use if publishing to npm via GitHub Actions — trusted publishing, provenance, semantic-release.

plugins.name: run-agent-browser
plugins.description: Use if driving the agent-browser CLI for ad hoc browser automation — @ref snapshots, forms.

plugins.name: run-aligned-delivery
plugins.description: Use if driving a large ambiguous initiative with scored question alignment before parallel exec.

plugins.name: run-codex-adversarial-loop
plugins.description: Use if fanning out parallel Codex adversarial reviews, verifying findings, fixing in worktrees.

plugins.name: run-codex-review-loop
plugins.description: Use if running Codex review loops across branches, lenses, comparisons, or convergence rounds.

plugins.name: run-deep-research
plugins.description: Use if running deep multi-file research over 5+ entities or a market — wave-dispatched corpus.

plugins.name: run-github-scout
plugins.description: Use if discovering GitHub repos, shortlisting candidates, or comparing OSS with repo evidence.

plugins.name: run-railway
plugins.description: Use if running railway CLI — deploys, logs, env vars, link, ssh, db shells, scaling.

plugins.name: run-repo-cleanup
plugins.description: Use if finishing a project — review and merge every branch/worktree into main, retire dead branches.

plugins.name: run-research
plugins.description: Use if answering one technical research question with current web + practitioner evidence.

plugins.name: run-review
plugins.description: Use if reviewing a PR/diff, requesting review on your branch, triaging feedback, or delegating.

plugins.name: run-tailscale-funnel
plugins.description: Use if exposing a local HTTP server at a public .ts.net URL via Tailscale Funnel.

plugins.name: search-it-bulk-by-codex
plugins.description: Use if running many small Codex-native web searches via codex exec with parseable answers.

plugins.name: test-by-mcpc-cli
plugins.description: Use if driving the mcpc CLI (0.2.x) to test or smoke-check an MCP server over stdio or HTTP.

plugins.name: update-agent-config
plugins.description: Use if auditing AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/REVIEW.md for drift after refactors — stale refs, rules.
